title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 256.080 - Duty of assistants
text:
256.080.  Duty of assistants. — It shall be the duty of the said assistants to make full and complete examinations, assays and analyses of all such rocks, ores, soils or other substances as may be submitted to them by the state geologist for the purpose, and to furnish him with a detailed and complete account of the results so obtained.
(RSMo 1939 § 14881) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13692; 1919 § 5758; 1909 § 6639
